modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with using the Files tab in Microsoft Teams

full_description_text:  
I need help with the Files tab in Microsoft Teams. I don’t know how to use it. I was trying to find files but couldn’t figure it out. The Files tab is there, but it’s confusing. I just want to understand how to use it properly.
short_description: Issues with using the Files tab in Microsoft Teams
description: I need help with the Files tab in Microsoft Teams. I don’t know how to use it. I was trying to find files but couldn’t figure it out. The Files tab is there, but it’s confusing. I just want to understand how to use it properly.
